channel.title: announcements
channel.description: Latest releases from announcements on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dropout Store Winter Merch Drop 2025
item.description:
Shop the brand new winter merch drop right now on the Dropout store:https://store.dropout.tv

Duration: 02:41

Tags: announcements, shopping, merchandise, holidays, cast interviews, izzy roland, jacquis neal, zeke nicholson, anna garcia, vic michaelis

item.title: Announcing Superfan
item.description:
You can now pay Dropout more, if you want. Or don't! Head over to dropout.tv/superfan to learn more.

Duration: 02:39

Tags: announcements, sam reich, subscription, price change, behind the scenes, blogs, live events, merchandise, Dropout Superfan
